rationale: Both correctly diagnose the config/topology mismatch (base tokenizer lacking <img_ratio_33..36>) and recommend the same confirmed workaround (hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml), matching the thread exactly. Y goes further with grounding — citing both deploy YAML headers/line numbers, explaining why the moe config even instantiates the AR stage, and showing how the downstream _all_ratio_ids builder degrades with an empty slice — plus a concrete tolerant-code fix rather than just a guard suggestion. Y also more explicitly closes the loop on Gaohan123's 'open a new issue' request. X is accurate but thinner on code-level grounding and fix specificity.
